title: Profitable residential cleaning company with recurring revenue
reasonForSelling: To dedicate more time to our real estate business.
supportTraining: Owner will stay involved in the business for 60-90 days with current salary to introduce new management/owner to current clients and employees. During that time I will train in our systems and process.
description:
This profitable residential cleaning company, established in 2014, offers an exceptional opportunity in the thriving Southlake, TX market. With annual revenue of $721,252 and strong recurring revenue streams from an established customer base, this home-based operation demonstrates consistent performance and scalability.

Business Overview:
The company has built a reputable presence in the residential cleaning sector over nearly a decade of operation. Operating as a home-based business eliminates overhead costs while maintaining operational efficiency. The recurring revenue model provides predictable cash flow and financial stability.

Financial Performance:
- Annual Revenue: $721,252
- EBITDA: $70,045
- Established recurring revenue base
- Profitable operations with growth trajectory

Key Strengths:
- Scalable business model with expansion potential
- Easy-to-manage operations
- Established and reputable brand in local market
- Multiple location expansion opportunities
- Strong foundation for growth in DFW area

Growth Opportunities:
Significant potential exists to expand this business through rebranding initiatives and coverage area expansion throughout the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex. The scalable model allows for increased profitability through strategic growth.

Owner Support:
The current owner will provide comprehensive transition support for 60-90 days post-sale, including client and employee introductions, systems training, and operational guidance to ensure smooth ownership transfer.

Location Advantage:
Southlake's affluent residential market provides an ideal customer base for premium cleaning services, with continued population growth supporting long-term business expansion.

This turnkey opportunity offers new ownership the foundation to build upon an established, profitable cleaning business with proven systems and significant growth potential in one of Texas's most desirable markets.

Ad#:2494705
